Name: Graduate UI kit to Storybook components
Notes: Promote the prototype kit (Btn, Card, Pill, Badge, AppShell, SectionTitle, LessonCard, Field, Toggle, Ring, Bar, Avatar, WeekDots, Icon) into real components with .stories.tsx so /design-sync exposes them. Prototype source: site-system/stax-kit.jsx (templates/stax-ui). AC: each component has a story + types; design-sync lists them under window.StocksDS or a kit namespace.

Name: ResearchChart: add fixtures / demo-data mode
Notes: Add a prop so ResearchChart renders from passed candle fixtures when no /api/candles backend is present. Unblocks composing it in design + Storybook. AC: <ResearchChart symbol fixtures={...}/> renders fully with no network.

Name: Write ResearchChart.stories.tsx
Notes: Sized wrapper + MSW candles handler + seeded localStorage (drawings/alerts) + variants (EMAs, RSI/MACD, supply-demand zones). AC: story renders all 7 canvas layers with no console errors.

Name: Publish App Screen starter template
Notes: Ship the kit-based starter (prototype: templates/stax-ui/StaxScreen.dc.html) as a real starting point. AC: a new screen can be scaffolded from it with nav shell + cards + chart.

Name: Daily content selection service
Notes: Date-seeded job that picks chart-of-the-day (dataset + correct candle index + pattern) and question-of-the-day (prompt/options/correct/explanation). Same for all users per calendar day. AC: deterministic per date; API returns today's payload.

Name: Per-user daily state + streak reset
Notes: Model dailyCompleted, dailyGoal {done,target}, lastCompletedDate, streakCount with timezone-aware break logic. AC: streak increments once/day, breaks on a missed day in user TZ.

Name: XP + streak mutation service
Notes: Award XP and advance streak on daily challenge / QOTD / lesson completion; define bonuses (double-XP daily, +10 QOTD). AC: idempotent per action; auditable ledger.

Name: Today screen UI
Notes: Chart-of-day hero, QOTD with reveal, daily-goal ring, streak strip, what-to-test launcher. Prototype: site-system/s_daily.jsx. AC: matches prototype; wired to services above.

Name: Reminders & streak notifications
Notes: Daily reminder at user-set time + streak-about-to-break nudge. Prototype schedule UI: s_settings.jsx (Notifications). AC: respects per-type toggles + quiet hours.

Name: Lesson content model
Notes: Schema for a lesson as ordered steps (teach | choice | tap) with chart refs, options, correct, explain. AC: authorable; validated; versioned.

Name: Lesson player UI
Notes: Full-bleed step-through: progress bar, hearts, select->check->feedback->continue, completion (XP/accuracy/hearts). Prototype: site-system/s_player.jsx. AC: matches prototype incl. tap-the-candle exercise.

Name: Hearts / lives mechanic
Notes: Decide model (gate progress? refill over time? gems?). Wrong inline check costs a heart. AC: configurable cap + refill; defined retry rules.

Name: Achievement catalog + criteria engine
Notes: Define badge taxonomy (tiers, categories) + a rules engine evaluating progress/goal. Prototype: s_badges.jsx. AC: badges award automatically on criteria met.

Name: Achievements grid UI
Notes: Category filter, closest-to-unlocking spotlight, earned/locked tiles with progress. Prototype: s_badges.jsx. AC: matches prototype; live progress.

Name: Weekly league cohort + reset job
Notes: Assign users to weekly cohorts (skill-based or random?), compute standings, promote top-N / demote bottom-N, reset weekly. Prototype: s_leaderboard.jsx. AC: fair cohorts; scheduled reset; anti-cheat on XP.

Name: Leaderboard UI
Notes: Podium, promotion/demotion zones, League/Friends toggle, countdown. Prototype: s_leaderboard.jsx. AC: matches prototype.

Name: Market data service
Notes: Quotes + candles for stocks/ETFs/crypto. Decide real-time vs delayed, market hours vs 24/7, corporate actions. AC: /api/{candles,quote,snapshot} with documented latency.

Name: Positions/orders service + order engine
Notes: Virtual cash + positions + orders. Support market/limit/stop/stop-limit, buy/sell; fills (incl. resting orders crossing price), avg-cost + realized/unrealized P&L. Prototype logic: site-system/trade_store.js. AC: balances reconcile; fills match spec.

Name: Trading desk UI
Notes: Account header, stat tiles, portfolio chart, positions table, watchlist, open orders, missions strip, tilt nudge. Prototype: s_trade.jsx. AC: matches prototype; live updates.

Name: Stock detail + order ticket UI
Notes: Search, ResearchChart, key stats, news, position card, order ticket (types, qty, limit/stop, TIF, trade-thesis journaling), review->confirm->post-trade scoring. Prototype: s_stock.jsx. AC: matches prototype.

Name: Order history
Notes: All/Open/Filled/Cancelled with journaled thesis inline; cancel open orders. Prototype: s_orders.jsx. AC: matches prototype.

Name: Tilt / overtrading guardrails
Notes: Detect rapid trading / loss-chasing; show nudge + optional timeout. Prototype nudge: s_trade.jsx / ticket review. AC: configurable thresholds; logged.

Name: Trade-quality scoring + XP
Notes: Reward discipline (journaled thesis, price-controlled order, measured pace) not churn. Prototype: OrderTicket done-stage. AC: score + XP per fill.

Name: Options chain data + pricing
Notes: Expiries + strikes around spot with a premium model. Prototype: s_options.jsx (intrinsic+time-value stub). AC: chain API; reasonable premiums.

Name: Options multi-leg builder + payoff
Notes: Tap-to-add legs, long/short, net debit/credit, payoff curve (DS PayoffDiagram). Prototype: s_options.jsx. AC: matches prototype.

Name: Wire options into positions / P&L
Notes: Options are a standalone concept in the prototype; integrate into the trade store so option positions affect buying power + P&L. AC: option fills appear in positions; P&L correct at expiry.

Name: Clubs data model
Notes: Clubs + membership (a user belongs to many clubs and friend circles). Prototype: s_clubs.jsx. AC: many-to-many; roles; privacy of holdings.

Name: Club + friend leaderboards
Notes: Per-club and friends standings tied to weekly returns. AC: consistent with global league rules.

Name: Invite friends / create club flows
Notes: Replace prototype stubs with real invites (link/contacts) + club creation. Prototype: s_clubs.jsx. AC: invite link works; club created with members.

Name: Weekly trading challenge
Notes: Best paper return wins; ties into league. Framed as play-smart. AC: cohort + reset + rewards defined.

Name: Auth + SSO
Notes: Google, Apple, Microsoft, GitHub, and company SSO (SAML). Prototype: s_auth.jsx. AC: each provider signs in; session persisted; profile fields captured.

Name: Settings sub-pages
Notes: Account, Notifications (reminder time + toggles), Plan & billing (Free/Pro), Appearance, Security. Prototype: s_settings.jsx. AC: each pane persists.

Name: Global search
Notes: Symbols + lessons + glossary terms; trending + empty/loading/error states. Prototype: s_search.jsx. AC: ranked results; deep-links.

Name: Notifications inbox
Notes: Typed feed (price/learning/social), read/unread, filters, mark-all-read, deep-links. Prototype: s_alerts.jsx. AC: realtime-ish; matches prototype.

Name: Legal / About pages
Notes: About, Terms, Privacy. Replace placeholder copy with legal-approved text. Prototype: s_legal.jsx. AC: final copy; linked from auth + footer.

Name: Mobile responsive layouts
Notes: Phone layouts for Today, Lesson, Invest, Stock. Prototype: site-system/Stax Mobile.html + m_screens.jsx. AC: core loop usable at 390px; 44px hit targets.

Name: Bottom tab navigation
Notes: Today / Learn / Invest / You tab bar on mobile. Prototype: m_screens.jsx (MTabBar). AC: routes between core screens.

Name: Mobile chart touch interactions
Notes: ResearchChart with touch crosshair, pinch-zoom, tap tools on mobile. AC: usable on touch; no jank.

Name: Empty / loading / error states
Notes: Define + build across screens (empty portfolio, loading quotes, failed order, no results, offline). AC: every async surface has all three states.
